metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5236
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4-7: immunogold EM of rat striatum tissue showed Striatin (STRN) was localized to dendrites, dendritic spines and (to a lesser extend) PSD.

Authors comment on non-postsynaptic localization:
"In agreement with previous observations by Castets et al.,[PMID:8769426] axonal processes and terminals, as well as myelinated fibres bundles, were devoid of striatin immunolabelling. So were glial cells, pericytes and endothelial capillary cells.". Experimental description: M&M: "All experiments were carried out on adult female Wistar rats (220-240 g; Iffa-Credo) kept under standard laboratory conditions"

antibody:
"rabbit anti-striatin antibody (1-3 μg/ml of affinity-purified antibodies directed against peptide II, corresponding to amino acids 191-205), previously characterized by Castets et al.,[3]" PMID:8769426

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
